import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./CardsView.css"; const CardsView: React.FC = () => { const [selected, setSelected] = useState(0); const [cardFlipped, setCardFlipped] = useState(false); const cards = [ { type: "Visa Platinum", number: "**** **** **** 4821", name: "ANA CAROLINA", expiry: "12/28", limit: 8000, used: 2640, color: "var(--blue-800)", color2: "var(--blue-600)" }, { type: "Mastercard Gold", number: "**** **** **** 9034", name: "ANA CAROLINA", expiry: "08/27", limit: 5000, used: 1820, color: "#1e3a5f", color2: "#2563eb" }, ]; const card = cards[selected]; const usedPct = (card.used / card.limit) * 100; return (
